items.name: adidas Community Animation Pack
items.description:
We skate, we groove, we wall-walk and we t-pose swim? Sounds about right. Introducing Roblox’s very first community inspired Animation Pack.

Winners for each category from the adidas community pack competition: 

Walk: @ AltiWyre 
Run: @ AltiWyre
Idle: @ grayscaIed
Jump: @ltsCheeks
Swim: @ specialJan 
Fall: @ e6thn 
Climb: @DuskEnjoyedFlowers

items.name: Alo Yoga Pose - Lotus Position
items.description: From the Alo Spring 2023 Collection - this exclusive emote brings your avatar into this concentrating resting pose - the Lotus calms the mind & body, while focusing on controlled breathing.  The Lotus is symbolic of birth, growth & enlightenment.
